stories.title: Isa Torres Commits to Texas — 'I'm Coming Home'
stories.angle: D1 Softball Player of the Year Isa Torres (.530 BA / .978 SLG / .591 OBP / 78 runs / NCAA record 16 consecutive hits) has committed to the University of Texas, posting a photo in burnt orange with the caption "I'm coming home." Torres, a Georgetown, TX native, spent three seasons at Florida State before entering the portal. She joins catcher Samantha Swan (Arizona State) and pitcher Samantha Lincoln (Texas Tech) in what is now Mike White's most consequential portal class since taking over the Longhorns program.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
SHE'S COMING HOME.

Isa Torres — D1 Player of the Year, .530 BA, .978 SLG — has committed to Texas.

Georgetown, TX native. Two-time national champions. "I'm coming home."

The No. 1 player in the portal just landed in Austin. #HookEm #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Isa Torres to Texas is the portal story of 2026.

.530 BA. .978 SLG. .591 OBP. 78 runs. NCAA record 16 consecutive hits.

A native Texan home to two-time defending champs.

Texas had Swan and Lincoln. Now they have the Player of the Year. #HookEm

article.headline: Isa Torres Commits to Texas — 'I'm Coming Home'

stories.title: Beachum Watch — Day 12, Visited Florida, Three Days Left
stories.angle: Jaysoni Beachum (.417 BA / 16 HR / 66 RBI / .549 OBP / career 37 HR / 180 RBI / 202 H at FSU) has visited the Florida Gators — FSU's biggest in-state rival — as she enters Day 12 of the transfer portal window. Softball America's No. 1 rated transfer and only elite player still uncommitted. The portal window closes June 22. Three days remain. Whether it's Gainesville or another destination, a decision is imminent.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Torres is gone. The last big name in the portal:

Jaysoni Beachum. Day 12. Three days left.

.417 BA. 16 HR. 66 RBI. Softball America No. 1. Has visited Florida.

The window closes June 22. Somebody is about to get a game-changer. #SoftballTwitter

stories.title: Texas Portal Class Is Complete — Torres + Swan + Lincoln
stories.angle: With Torres signing confirmed, Texas head coach Mike White has assembled the most impactful portal class of his tenure. Three verified contributors: Torres (D1 Player of the Year, .530 BA, First-Team All-American), Swan (ASU, elite bat-handler), Lincoln (Texas Tech transfer pitcher). The two-time defending national champions just loaded a roster that was already the class of the sport. What does Texas look like in 2027?

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
The Texas portal class is set:

✅ Isa Torres — D1 Player of the Year, .530 BA
✅ Samantha Swan — Catcher, Arizona State
✅ Samantha Lincoln — Pitcher, Texas Tech

Mike White added the Player of the Year to a two-time champion.

The 2027 Longhorns are terrifying. #HookEm

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Two-time defending champs. Three elite portal adds. 

Texas already won the WCWS twice. Now they signed the single best player in the portal.

The 2026 portal window might be the most consequential offseason in college softball history. #HookEm

article.headline: Texas Portal Class Is Complete — Torres, Swan and Lincoln Join Two-Time Champions

stories.title: Portal Final Push — Yarnell to Arkansas, Three Days Remain
stories.angle: With the portal window closing June 22, mid-level moves are filling out rosters. UCF utility player Kendall Yarnell (.344 BA / 15 HR / 46 RBI as a sophomore) has committed to Arkansas. Texas Tech roster turnover is creating openings. Mountain West programs active in secondary market. Coaches who didn't land elite names are pivoting to depth.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Portal window closes June 22 — 3 days left.

While everyone watches for Beachum, rosters are being built in the background.

Kendall Yarnell (UCF, .344 BA, 15 HR, 46 RBI) commits to Arkansas.

The secondary market is moving fast. #SoftballTwitter #Razorbacks

article.headline: Portal Final Push: Yarnell to Arkansas, Three Days Remain

stories.title: Portal Tracker — Day 12 of 15, Three Days to Close
stories.angle: Day 12 of the 15-day transfer portal window. Three days remain before the June 22 close. Now confirmed: Torres (Texas), Swan (Texas), Lincoln (Texas), Polar (Texas Tech), Heavener (Texas Tech), Pickering (Texas Tech), Hartley (OSU), Wetteland (Arkansas), Azua (Texas A&M), Plumlee (Alabama), Altmeyer (Texas), Shelton (Tennessee), Yarnell (Arkansas). Still uncommitted: Beachum (No. 1 remaining, Softball America). The window is nearly closed.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
2026 Softball Portal — Day 12 of 15

DONE: Torres (TX), Polar/Heavener/Pickering (TTU), Swan/Lincoln (TX), Hartley (OSU), Wetteland/Yarnell (Ark), Azua (A&M), Plumlee (Ala), Shelton (Tenn)

STILL OUT: Beachum (No. 1)

3 days left. #SoftballTwitter
